VILL220102.description: Unified statistical potential: pairwise interaction with desolvation of both residues (Villegas-Levy, 2022)
VILL220102.title: A unified statistical potential reveals that amino acid stickiness governs nonspecific recruitment of client proteins into condensates
VILL220102.comment: Unified statistical potential, pairwise interaction including the desolvation of both residues (Fig 2e); M[i][j] = contact(i,j) + stickiness(i) + stickiness(j).

VILL220103.description: Unified statistical potential: pairwise interaction with desolvation of one residue, asymmetric (Villegas-Levy, 2022)
VILL220103.title: A unified statistical potential reveals that amino acid stickiness governs nonspecific recruitment of client proteins into condensates
VILL220103.comment: Unified statistical potential, pairwise interaction including the desolvation of the column residue only (Fig 2d); ASYMMETRIC, M[i][j] = contact(i,j) + stickiness(j).

VILL220104.description: Unified statistical potential: pairwise residue contact propensity, no desolvation (Villegas-Levy, 2022)
VILL220104.title: A unified statistical potential reveals that amino acid stickiness governs nonspecific recruitment of client proteins into condensates
VILL220104.comment: Unified statistical potential, pairwise residue contact propensity without desolvation (Fig 2c, Eq 8/9).
